title: tanacetum nitens
intro: Tanacetum nitens, also known as shining tansy, is a perennial plant species belonging to the sunflower family (Asteraceae). It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating digestive issues, such as nausea and bloating, due to its carminative and anti-inflammatory effects. The plant's health benefits include reducing anxiety and stress, improving sleep quality, and exhibiting antimicrobial properties. Tanacetum nitens can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to support digestive health and promote relaxation.
